query: SELECT bsa.id, bsa.bulkSessionId, bsa.analysisId, bsa.position, a.status, a.videoId FROM bulkSessionAnalyses bsa LEFT JOIN analyses a ON bsa.analysisId = a.id ORDER BY bsa.id DESC LIMIT 20;
